fields.summary: Support Container Storage Interface (CSI) in YARN

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
status.name: Open

issuetype.description: A new feature of the product, which has yet to be developed.
issuetype.name: New Feature

fields.description: Since the csi-driver-adaptor's runtime depends on protobuf3, we need to run it with a seperate class loader. Aux service provides such ability, this ticket is tracking the effort to run the adaptors as NM's aux services.

resolution.description: A fix for this issue is checked into the tree and tested.
resolution.name: Fixed

fields.summary: Aux service system-class is loading from a wrong property

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
status.name: Resolved

issuetype.description: A problem which impairs or prevents the functions of the product.
issuetype.name: Bug

Hi [~cheersyang]

Thanks for the work.

Some comments

1. CsiAdaptorPlugin getAdaptor, we can have isAssignableFrom check to see whether it is a correct impl of not.

2. During serviceStart of CsiAdaptorServices, any exception handling is needed?

3. Could we rename CsiAdaptor4Test to MockCsiAdaptor or something similar.
+1 to latest patch. pending jenkins.
